templates.name: Rewards: How long before I can use my points?
templates.content: With our policy, any coins (reward points) earned for purchases will be listed as pending for 30 days.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Our relentless crew would be stoked to have you! Apply here: https://relentlessbetrayal.attn.tv/sl/7qBdljIM to join our crew!

templates.name: Do the hats run smaller or larger?
templates.content: Our hats are all sized 59-63 cm.

templates.name: Wholesale
templates.content: Unfortunately, at this time we're not offering wholesale/dropship orders. It is something we may be looking into in the future, so always keep an eye out!

templates.name: Customer Support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at info@relentlessbetrayal.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Ring size
templates.content: You can check out this link for a step-by-step guide on how to choose your ring size: https://relentlessbetrayal.com/pages/ring-sizing-guide

templates.name: Warranty Policy (jewelry)
templates.content: Our brand stands behind the quality of our jewelry with a lifetime warranty! This warranty is valid for the life of the product and covers any/all issues. This warranty is, however, void if there's damage due to improper use, damage caused by your modification, aesthetic changes from normal wear and tear or aging (minor scratches, etc). If the item in question is no longer for sale, or sold out, a store credit will be issued. We've got your back!

templates.name: Is the "Prey, No Pay Tan Snapback" similar to the "Richardson 112"?
templates.content: They're similar, the brim isn't as curved as it is on the Richardson 112.

templates.name: Return Policy
templates.content: We accept returns on any unworn items within 30 days. To be eligible for a return, your item must be unused and in the same condition that you received it. You can check out our detailed return policy here - https://relentlessbetrayal.com/pages/shipping-returns

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/relentlessbetrayal and FB here: https://web.facebook.com/RelentlessBetrayal

templates.name: Customer didn't receive discount for the app download
templates.content: Thanks for downloading the app! Here's your code to get $10 off: APP10

templates.name: Restock? (autosend enabled)
templates.content: I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock, but I recommend checking our website and social media frequently.

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Our clothes generally run true to size. Would you mind sharing your usual size?

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We usually ship via USPS or UPS. Order processing takes 2-3 business days, and once shipped, it's in the carriers hands via the method you choose at checkout.

templates.name: Start return/exchange
templates.content: You can start your return/exchange through this link: https://relentlessbetrayal.attn.tv/sl/tOAicq2R

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://relentlessbetrayal.com/collections/current-sale-items

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you?

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://relentlessbetrayal.com/collections/current-sale-items

templates.name: Free Shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping to the US and Canada on orders over $100! Maybe you can add something else to reach the min?

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://relentlessbetrayal.com/pages/rewards

templates.name: App Password Reset
templates.content: Please note that our app now operates solely with one-time verification codes, which are sent directly to the user. This means that traditional passwords are no longer in use, and consequently, there is no option to reset them.
